Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

List of new BBT or BBTI books printed after 1977?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2009-12-30 · 4 answers
Not including reprints, new versions, or Vyasa-puja books.
user [38] · 2009-12-31
This is a question for BBT divisions.
user [170] · 2009-12-31
TEACHINGS OF LORD KAPILA
SCIENCE OF SELF-REALIZATION
LIFE COMES FROM LIFE
PATH OF PERFECTION
RAJA-VIDYA, THE KING OF KNOWLEDGE
PERFECTION OF YOGA
ON THE WAY TO KRSNA
PERFECT QUESTIONS, PERFECT ANSWERS
TOPMOST YOGA SYSTEM
ELEVATION TO KRSNA CONSCIOUSNESS
BEYOND BIRTH AND DEATH
MATCHLESS GIFT
RESERVOIR OF PLEASURE
PRABHUPADA (LILAMRTA)
JOURNEY OF SELF-DISCOVERY
SECOND CHANCE
MESSAGE OF GODHEAD
CIVILIZATION AND TRANSCENDENCE
LIGHT OF THE BHAGAVAT
TRANSC. TEACHINGS OF PRAHLAD MAHARAJA
COMING BACK
THE HARE KRISHNA BOOK OF VEG. COOKING

and also

* A Second Chance
* Acharya
* Art of Transcendence
* Beyond Birth and Death
* Beyond Illusion and Doubt
* Brhad Bhagavatamrta, Volume Three
* Brhad-Bhagavatamrta, Volume One
* Brhad-Bhagavatamrta, Volume Two
* Chant and Be Happy
* Civilization and Transcendence
* Coming Back
* Cooking with Kurma
* Dharma: The Way of Transcendence
* Divine Nature
* Easy Journey to Other Planets
* Elevation to Krishna Consciousness
* Great Vegetarian Dishes
* Hare Krsna Book of Vegetarian Cooking
* Hidden Glory of India
* Laws of Nature: An Infallible Justice
* Mechanistic and Nonmechanistic Science
* Mukunda-mala-stotra
* Narada-bhakti-sutra
* Origins Magazine
* Our Original Position
* Quick Vegetarian Dishes
* Searching for Vedic India
* Sri Brahma Samhita
* Srila Prabhupada-lilamrta
* Srimad Bhagavad Gita Verse Book
* Temple Bhajana Book
* The Book of Eggfree Cakes
* The Hare Krsna Music Book
* The Path of Yoga
* Vedic Cosmography and Astronomy
* Vegetarian World Food
* Your Ever Well-Wisher

No kidding...
user [149] · 2010-01-01
Thanks borokrsnadas. Was there a list of each books author with that list?

Heres two others I found on Wikipedia:

Devamrita Swami, Perfect Escape, 1994, Bhaktivedanta Book Trust, ISBN 9-171-49480-4.
Harikesa Swami, Varnasrama Manifesto for Social Sanity, 1981, Bhaktivedanta Book Trust, ISBN 0-892-13042-3.
user [170] · 2010-01-02
Use book database search to get lists of authors, dont be lazy!
